docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CARLOS LOPEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH.ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUADARRAMA, DELIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUADARRAMA, DELIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VILLAMAR, JOAQUIN EVEN IF THE TESTIMONY WAS SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF LOANED MONEY TO DEFENDANT, THE CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED MAY-21-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAMAR, JOAQUIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GUADARRAMA, DELIA AS TO DEFENDANT VILLAMAR, JOAQUIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
